modules.name: 无后摇-破冰-提前-H
modules.code:
(function(){const CONFIG={TIME_ADVANCE:80,ICE_BREAK_KEY:'h',ESCAPE_DURATION:420};if(window._macroKeyDownHandler)window.removeEventListener('keydown',window._macroKeyDownHandler,true);if(window._macroKeyUpHandler)window.removeEventListener('keyup',window._macroKeyUpHandler,true);const macroState={isBreaking:false,lastDirKey:null};const heldKeys=new Set();const noBackswingState={32:false,70:false};const DIR_MAP={87:{name:'上',opposite:83},38:{name:'上',opposite:40},83:{name:'下',opposite:87},40:{name:'下',opposite:38},65:{name:'左',opposite:68},37:{name:'左',opposite:39},68:{name:'右',opposite:65},39:{name:'右',opposite:37}};if(!window._originalPomeloNotify){window._originalPomeloNotify=window.pomelo.notify;}window.pomelo.notify=function(route,msg){if(route==="area.playerHandler.sendAction"&&msg&&msg.input){msg.input.ts=Date.now()-CONFIG.TIME_ADVANCE;}return window._originalPomeloNotify.apply(this,arguments);};function fireKey(keyCode){document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{keyCode:keyCode,which:keyCode,bubbles:true,cancelable:true}));document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup',{keyCode:keyCode,which:keyCode,bubbles:true,cancelable:true}));}window._macroKeyDownHandler=function(e){if(!e.isTrusted)return;if(e.target.tagName==='INPUT'||e.target.tagName==='TEXTAREA')return;const key=e.keyCode;heldKeys.add(key);if(DIR_MAP[key])macroState.lastDirKey=key;if(e.key.toLowerCase()===CONFIG.ICE_BREAK_KEY&&macroState.lastDirKey&&!macroState.isBreaking){macroState.isBreaking=true;const oppKey=DIR_MAP[macroState.lastDirKey].opposite;document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup',{keyCode:macroState.lastDirKey,bubbles:true}));fireKey(32);document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{keyCode:oppKey,bubbles:true}));setTimeout(()=>{document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup',{keyCode:oppKey,bubbles:true}));macroState.isBreaking=false;heldKeys.forEach(k=>{if(DIR_MAP[k]){document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{keyCode:k,which:k,bubbles:true,cancelable:true}));}});},CONFIG.ESCAPE_DURATION);}if(key===32||key===70){if(noBackswingState[key]||e.repeat){e.stopPropagation();e.preventDefault();return;}noBackswingState[key]=true;setTimeout(()=>{let fakeKeyUp=new KeyboardEvent('keyup',{keyCode:key,which:key,bubbles:true,cancelable:true});document.dispatchEvent(fakeKeyUp);},1);}};window._macroKeyUpHandler=function(e){if(!e.isTrusted)return;const key=e.keyCode;heldKeys.delete(key);if(key===32||key===70){noBackswingState[key]=false;}};window.addEventListener('keydown',window._macroKeyDownHandler,true);window.addEventListener('keyup',window._macroKeyUpHandler,true);console.clear();console.log("%c✔️ 终极电竞宏 V4.0 注入成功！(单发零后摇版)","color: white; background: #0077b6; font-size: 16px; padding: 8px; border-radius: 4px;");console.log(`
👉 时延欺骗：已设为 ${CONFIG.TIME_ADVANCE}ms (后台自动运行)
👉 零后摇模式：【空格键】与【F键】已彻底消除硬直，按一次只推一次！
👉 碎冰衔接：按下『 ${CONFIG.ICE_BREAK_KEY.toUpperCase()} 』键触发
`);})();
